overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a character in a red coat exploring a rocky coastal environment at night. The character walks along a shoreline path with wooden barriers, passes a campfire, and runs toward a cave entrance in the cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path beside cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky path beside a tall cliff face on the left

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation running parallel to the path on the left side
clumps of tall yellow grass scattered across the rocky ground
clear night sky filled with visible stars above the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky path at night, with a massive cliff face on the left and patches of tall grass on the right. The starry sky is visible above as the character moves forward through the sparse coastal terrain.

events.description: path opens up to reveal ocean shoreline with wooden barriers on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline path with the ocean visible to the right beyond wooden barriers

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and planks forming a barrier along the shoreline
dark ocean water visible beyond the wooden barriers under the night sky
flickering orange glow from a fire near the cliff base ahead

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide coastal shoreline with wooden barriers lining the right side and the ocean visible beyond. A campfire glows in the distance ahead as the character continues walking along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to cave entrance with campfire

events.description: character transitions from walking to running toward the cave entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the cave entrance, then breaking into a run through the increasingly dense tall grass

entered.detail: dark opening in the rock face with a mysterious red glow emanating from within
large rock formation creating a partial ceiling over the approaching path
scattered broken wooden planks and ruined structures along the shore

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a cave entrance in the rock face where a red glow is visible inside. The campfire burns brighter as the character gets closer, then breaks into a run through the moderately dense grass toward the cave.

agents.ego_description: running through dense tall grass toward the cave entrance under the rocky overhang

entered.detail: wooden fence posts near the cave entrance marking a boundary

segments.scene_description: Running under the rocky overhang that blocks most of the sky, the character moves through dense tall grass toward the now-prominent cave entrance. A wooden picket fence appears on the left as the character approaches the dark opening with its red interior glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal coastline that transitions from an open starry landscape into the claustrophobic mouth of a glowing cave. It begins with the character walking a narrow rocky path beneath a vast starry sky, flanked by a massive cliff face and patches of tall grass. As the terrain opens, the camera follows the character onto a wide shoreline where wooden barriers line the path and a distant campfire begins to glow. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the burning fire and breaks into a run through moderately dense grass toward a red light emanating from the rock face. Finally, the camera moves under a heavy rocky overhang that blocks the sky, passing a wooden picket fence before arriving at the dark cave entrance and its prominent red interior glow.
